projectDescription: A compact operational contract that keeps AI assistants cognitively bounded, disciplined, and reviewable during consequential technical work.
keyFeatures: Pre-action cognitive framing: forces the assistant to close target, authority, and mode before acting
Horizontal Plane (A/B/C) operating skeleton for bounded, inspectable decisions
Derived invariants that turn posture into repeatable behavioral constraints
Stop conditions that halt action when the move is not clean enough to proceed
Final Response Contract footer (Touch / Ground / State / Convergence) for honest closure
Recovery boundary protocol for incoherent states
Output discipline for human and constrained-destination use cases
Drift detection and re-entry mechanism to keep the contract active across a session
publicApiSurface: Horizontal Plane: A (close context), B (read the move), C (execute minimally and report honestly)
Final Response Contract (Touch / Ground / State / Convergence)
Output for Human and Constrained Use
